taste-skill: The main design skill for premium frontend code. Covers layout, typography, colors, spacing, and motion.
gpt-taste: Elite Awwwards-level frontend design and GSAP motion skill for premium, deterministic, anti-slop UI generation.
image-to-code-skill: Image-first frontend skill for generating premium website references, deeply analyzing them, and implementing code to match.
imagegen-frontend-web: Image-generation-only skill for creating premium website design reference images. Does not write code.
imagegen-frontend-mobile: Image-generation-only skill for creating premium mobile app screen concepts and flows. Does not write code.
brandkit: Image-generation-only skill for creating premium brand-kit overview images with logo concepts, identity systems, color palettes, typography, and mockups. Does not write code.
redesign-skill: For upgrading existing projects by auditing and fixing design problems.
soft-skill: Focuses on an expensive, soft UI look with premium fonts, whitespace, depth, and smooth animations.
output-skill: Prevents AI from being lazy, skipping code blocks, or using placeholder comments.
minimalist-skill: Enforces clean, editorial-style interfaces (Notion/Linear style) with strict monochrome palettes.
brutalist-skill: Raw mechanical interfaces, Swiss typography, extreme scale contrast. (Beta)
stitch-skill: Google Stitch-compatible semantic design rules for premium AI UI generation.


Pipeline now clean. Flow depends on what you start with:

1. New build (greenfield page/app UI)

impeccable auto-triggers (its description covers design/redesign/polish/etc). Inside it:

/impeccable teach      → one-time per project: writes PRODUCT.md (+ DESIGN.md)
/impeccable shape X    → UX plan + design brief, you approve brief
/impeccable craft X    → builds feature end-to-end (runs shape first if no brief)

Gates matter: craft refuses to touch files until PRODUCT.md exists and you've confirmed shape brief. First run on fresh project always detours through teach. After context exists, plain /impeccable <anything> works without ceremony.

Then refine passes as needed: critique, audit, polish, bolder, quieter, animate, typeset, layout. live = pick elements in browser, generate variants.

2. Existing project that looks AI-generic

redesign-skill. No setup, no PRODUCT.md. Scan → diagnose against its checklist → targeted fixes in priority order (font swap → color → hover states → layout → components → states → typography polish). Use when you want fast facelift without impeccable's process.

Overlap note: impeccable critique/audit also review existing UI — but they score and report; redesign-skill just fixes. Pick by intent: analysis → impeccable, "make it not look AI" → redesign-skill.

3. Want specific aesthetic

Invoke preset explicitly — they don't auto-trigger well by design intent:
- minimalist-skill → Notion-like editorial, warm monochrome, pastels
- brutalist-skill → Swiss print / military terminal, mono type, hazard red

These stack on top of whichever flow above: preset sets the look, impeccable/redesign does process.

4. Visual reference before code

Image gen, no code:
- imagegen-frontend-web → one image per landing-page section
- imagegen-frontend-mobile → app screens in phone mockups
- brandkit → logo/identity boards

Typical combo: imagegen-web for direction → impeccable craft to implement.

What changed vs before

Before: "design a landing page" could match 5 overlapping skills with contradicting rules (Inter b one obvious route per situation, no roulette. Taste rules didn't vanish — impeccable's design laws+ reference files carry them.
